subcodes.first_line: O ye survivors of that noble leader of the free, His Holiness Siyyid Mustafa, who hath spread the wings of sanctity and ascended unto the divine Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بازماندگان آن سرور آزادگان حضرت سید مصطفی شهپر تقدیس گشود و باشیان الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @knowledge; recognition of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
